description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house set within a fenced rectangular lot featuring a spacious green lawn, a swimming pool, and a detached garage. The house exterior is primarily white with large windows, flat and low-pitched roof sections, and multiple outdoor living spaces including a patio and a balcony. The front entryway is accessed by a wide staircase flanked by hedges, leading to a prominent central door. The backyard includes a paved patio area with outdoor furniture and a row of tall trees providing privacy. The garage is attached to the front right side of the house and features a dark, gabled roof. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, a detached garage, swimming pool, and spacious fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with wide steps, central door, attached garage, and swimming pool on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, row of tall trees, and the pool area, with the house's rear patio partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio area, multiple glass doors, and balcony, with the garage on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, tall trees, and the house's side elevation with windows and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with wide steps, flanked by hedges, featuring a prominent door and no porch or columns
